_note: Concept-quiz category registry. ONE source of truth for the loader and content authoring. Each language shows the 14 shared categories plus its one language-specific category (15 total). 'file' is the JSON filename (without extension) under shared/ or by_language/<lang>/. Order here is the order categories appear in the UI. Difficulty levels used across items: easy (freshman) and medium (sophomore).

shared_categories.label: Syntax
shared_categories.blurb: Intros, printing, and basic program shape.

shared_categories.label: Strings
shared_categories.blurb: Text, indexing, and common string operations.

shared_categories.label: Algorithm Problems - Part 1
shared_categories.blurb: Build foundational algorithms by arranging code (8 questions).

shared_categories.label: Algorithm Problems - Part 2
shared_categories.blurb: Practice moderately harder, multi-step algorithms (8 questions).

shared_categories.label: Debug - Part 1
shared_categories.blurb: Find and fix common beginner bugs (8 questions).

shared_categories.label: Debug - Part 2
shared_categories.blurb: Trace edge cases and multi-step bugs (8 questions).

java.label: Classes & Objects
java.blurb: Fields, constructors, and making your own objects.
